name: Splunk Connect for SNMP MCP Tools
description: Read-only MCP tools for SC4SNMP Splunk-side readiness and data checks.
author: splunk-connect-for-snmp-setup skill

tools.name: sc4snmp_indexes
tools.title: SC4SNMP Event And Metrics Indexes
tools.description: Check SC4SNMP event and metrics index readiness.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/indexes count=0 | search title=sc4snmp OR title=sc4snmp_metrics OR title=netops_metrics | table title disabled datatype totalEventCount currentDBSizeMB maxTotalDataSizeMB splunk_server | sort title

tools.name: sc4snmp_hec_tokens
tools.title: SC4SNMP HEC Token State
tools.description: Check HEC tokens that appear to target SC4SNMP indexes.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/http count=0 | search title=*sc4snmp* OR indexes=*sc4snmp* OR indexes=*netops_metrics* | table title disabled index indexes useACK sourcetype outputgroup | sort title

tools.name: sc4snmp_indexed_events
tools.title: SC4SNMP Indexed Events
tools.description: Summarize recent SC4SNMP event data by sourcetype and host.
tools.spl: | tstats count latest(_time) as latest where index=sc4snmp by index sourcetype host | eval latest=strftime(latest,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort -count

tools.name: sc4snmp_metric_catalog
tools.title: SC4SNMP Metric Catalog
tools.description: List visible SC4SNMP metric names from Splunk metrics indexes.
tools.spl: | mcatalog values(metric_name) as metric_name where index=sc4snmp_metrics OR index=netops_metrics by metric_name | sort metric_name

tools.name: sc4snmp_collector_logs
tools.title: SC4SNMP Collector Logs
tools.description: Summarize recent collector log events visible in Splunk.
tools.spl: search index=sc4snmp (sourcetype=sc4snmp:collector OR source=*sc4snmp*) | stats count latest(_time) as latest by host source sourcetype | eval latest=strftime(latest,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort -latest
